fin: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Finnish.
finny: adjective. Having one or more fins.
fit: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Meänkieli.
inn: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Isinai.
inti: noun. The currency of Peru between 1985 and 1991, replacing the sol.
nifty: adjective. Good, smart; useful or beneficial, often in an impressively clever way.
nit: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southeastern Kolami.
tinny: adjective. Of or pertaining to or resembling tin.
yin: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Yinchia.
